reason: Built-in destination tokens (date/week/quarter/initial/stem/ext and the file-date twins) and folder sorting are functional additions to the routing engine, not a redesign. The UI diff only adds an 'Applies to' dropdown, a built-in-token hint line and a 'Dated folders' submenu to the existing rules editor, reusing the established field, label, combo and menu styles, palette and layout. Wheel geometry, colours, animations and the overall editor layout are untouched. The rest of the diff is SortService/FileMeta/WatcherService plumbing and tests. No new screen or visual language was introduced, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
